query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, c.id as client_id, c.name as client_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Martha%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, c.id as client_id, c.name as client_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Martha%';
